title: Freelance Full-Stack & AI Engineer
description: Independent freelance engineer specializing in AI-powered products, document processing, RAG systems, and full-stack SaaS development. Billing through Malt, working directly with clients across legal, bakery, industrial, and tech sectors.
highlights: Built a WhatsApp AI order agent for GOSSELIN bakery with NestJS, React, and PostgreSQL
Developing an information capitalization tool for a law firm using RAG over Teams calls, Outlook emails, and meeting transcriptions on sovereign French infrastructure

Building Auditex, a B2B SaaS for AI extraction from French professional documents (payslips, CVs, invoices) under Updev Solutions
Building Grow Online, a cross-platform social media automation SaaS with Gemini-powered video processing
Preparatory work on Veolia call summarization and classification project via Sia Partners

title: Consultant & AI Engineer

Worked on data mapping and HR system integrations with Workday, Microsoft Graph API, and Alibeez
Contributed to enterprise AI deployment strategies for multiple clients
Used self-hosted GitLab and integrated MCP tooling for internal workflows

title: AI Engineer

Reduced average handling time for customer service agents by providing instant AI-powered answers
Improved first-call resolution rates by eliminating manual document searches
